---
title: 'Technical Sergeant (TSgt) Nadine Etaine (Eta) Romanakov, USAF'
date: '2015-12-02T05:03:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8480750621131742647'
blogger_filename: '/2015/12/technical-sergeant-tsgt-nadine-etaine.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Character Sketch'
---

<br /><br /><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt;"></div><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in; margin-left: .5in; margin-right: 0in; margin-top: 0in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; text-indent: -.25in;"><div style="margin: 0px;"><span style="font-family: &quot;symbol&quot;;">·<span style="font-family: &quot;times new roman&quot;; font-size: 7pt; font-stretch: normal;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Character Sketch Template (<a href="https://www.udemy.com/blog/character-sketch-examples/">Hints</a>)(<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Now,_Discover_Your_Strengths" target="_blank">Strengths List</a>)(<a href="https://www.isa.org/templates/two-column.aspx?pageid=134103&amp;append=35734" target="_blank">Strengths details</a>)(<a href="http://www.16personalities.com/personality-types" target="_blank">16P-Types</a>)(<a href="http://www.16personalities.com/articles/our-theory" target="_blank">16P-Theory</a>)<o:p></o:p></span></div></div><br /><br /><br /><br /><br />Technical Sergeant (TSgt) Nadine Etaine (Eta) Romanakov, USAF<br /><br />Nadine Etaine (Eta) Romanakov<br /><br /><br />Chester was born on 01/01/1986, which makes him 29 years old as of 12/04/15.<br /><div><br /></div>Ash is 47 in the year 2015. His Date of Birth: 07/31/1968<br /><br />Eta is 35 in 2015. Her date of birth, 12/06/1980. He father is proud that she was born on the anniversary of the day Ireland became a free nation. At 10 years old, in 1990, her father is frightened by the escalating violence, which reminds him of the Kingsmill Massacre. He takes his family to the USA to start over.<br /><br />Letterkenny, Donegal County, Ireland<br /><br /><br /><br />Irish History:<br /><br />Northern Ireland (Protestant and part of UK)<br />Ireland (Republic of Ireland - Catholic, independent from UK)<br />12/06/1921 - Singed the Treaty between Great Britain and Ireland.<br />Fianna Fáil - Dominate political party in 1932 onwards<br />1937, Referendum for new Constitution was signed making Ireland an independent country, northern ireland stayed with the United Kingdom.<br />Ongoing violence to unite Ireland as one country from the late 1960's through the late 1990's, ending with a &nbsp;cease fire in 1998.<br />1976, 5 January - Kingsmill massacre: ten Protestant men are killed in County Armagh, Northern Ireland, by members of the Provisional Irish Republican Army using the cover name "South Armagh Republican Action Force", after loyalists shot dead six Catholic civilians in South Armagh the previous day.<br /><br /><br /><br /><br />Overview: Traits, Strengths, SDI, Type, Gifts, Talents, Skills<br /><br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"> </span>I. Physical Description<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">  </span>a. Hair<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>i. the color<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>ii. the style it is normally kept in<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>iii. any striking features about it<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">  </span>b. Eyes<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>i. their color<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>ii. glasses or no glasses?<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>iii. any striking features about them<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">  </span>c. Height/Weight<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>i. Height<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>ii. Weight<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>iii. body type<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">  </span>d. Style of Dress<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>i. clothing style<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>ii. particular colors<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>iii. regular outfits<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">  </span>e. Speech<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>i. a particular accent<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>ii. certain words or phrases the person might say<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">  </span>f. &nbsp;How Character Feels About Physical Appearance<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>i. brief sentence or two about the character’s feelings about their appearance written from character’s view<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>ii. ways the character appears to be working on their appearance<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"> </span>II. Personality<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">  </span>a. Mannerisms<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>i. certain little thing the character likes to do, like tearing up napkins while waiting for food at a restaurant<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>ii. another certain little thing the character likes to do<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">  </span>b. Bad Habits<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>i. Bad Habit 1<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>ii. Bad Habit 2<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">  </span>c. Strengths/Weaknesses<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>i. Strengths<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>ii. Weaknesses<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"> </span>III. Likes/Dislikes<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">  </span>a. Likes<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>i. Like 1<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>ii. Like 2<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">  </span>b. Dislikes<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>i. Dislike<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>ii. Dislike 2<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"> </span>IV. Family<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">  </span>a. Parents<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>i. Mom<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>ii. Dad<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">  </span>b. Siblings<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>i. sibling 1<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>ii. sibling 2<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">  </span>c. Extended Family<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>i. extended family member 1<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>ii. extended family member 2<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"> </span>V. Hobbies<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">  </span>a. Hobby 1<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>i. details about hobby<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>ii. character’s feelings about hobby<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">  </span>b. Hobby 2<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>i. details about hobby<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>ii. character’s feelings about hobby<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"> </span>VI. History<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">  </span>a. Childhood<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>i. Event<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>ii. Event<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>iii. character’s feelings about childhood<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">  </span>b. Teen Years<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>i. Event<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>ii. Event<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>iii. character’s feelings about teen years<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">  </span>c. Young Adulthood<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>i. Event<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>ii. Event<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>iii. character’s feelings about young adulthood<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">  </span>d. Just Before the Story Begins<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>i. Event<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>ii. Event<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">   </span>iii. character’s feelings about events<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;"> </span>VII. Conflicts<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">  </span>a. Inner Conflicts<br /><span class="Apple-tab-span" style="white-space: pre;">  </span>b. Outer Conflicts<br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin-bottom: 0in; margin-left: .5in; margin-right: 0in; margin-top: 0in; mso-list: l0 level1 lfo1; text-indent: -.25in;"><span style="font-family: &quot;symbol&quot;;">·<span style="font-family: &quot;times new roman&quot;; font-size: 7pt; font-stretch: normal;">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Character Sketch Template (<a href="https://www.udemy.com/blog/character-sketch-examples/">Hints</a>)<o:p></o:p></span></div><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Hello my name is Amy Truthfinder, and I’m here with xxxxxxxx from the xxxxxxx series, to find out more about him/her and get a little behind the scenes information.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">In the way of introductions:<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Xxxxxxx is a Primary/Supporting character in the book xxxxx. He has chosen to side with the (Good/Bad/ Neither, he remains neutral, is unware of the sides).<o:p></o:p></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Xxxxxx was born on xx/xx/xx, which makes him xxxx years old as of xx/xx/xx.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">He/She has the following distinct physical characteristics; xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx.<o:p></o:p></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Personality and Motivations:<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Tell me, what is your 16P Type, what are you top five Strengths finders results, and what one-three words best describes you?<o:p></o:p></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What do you do with<o:p></o:p></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">time when you are not working?<o:p></o:p></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What are the things you enjoy most in life?<o:p></o:p></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What things just bug you to no end?<o:p></o:p></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">If every job, task, and activity in the world paid the same (and it was more than enough to have everything you wanted) what would you do?<o:p></o:p></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">If you could sit down and chat with person who is alive today, who would it be? What about anyone not alive today? What about a non-real person? What about someone from your story world?<o:p></o:p></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Training and background<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Tell me about your schooling. What high school did you go to? Where did you go to college? What activities did you participate in? Sororities / Fraternities? Were you&nbsp; in any other groups? Did you work through school, loans, scholarships, rich family?<o:p></o:p></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Tell me about your major. How many degrees do you have? In what? Why that and not something else?<o:p></o:p></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What was your first job? How many jobs have you had? What was your favorite job? Least favorite job? What do you do now?<o:p></o:p></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Do you hold any licenses, specialties, etc.?<o:p></o:p></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">If you could switch jobs today what would you do? (Real and Imagined)<o:p></o:p></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Family history<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What are your parents name? Do you know your grandparents? Do you have an siblings? Cousins, Aunts, Uncles, Other important relatives? Are you related to anyone famous?<o:p></o:p></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What does your name mean, and why did you parents choose it?<o:p></o:p></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Is there anything interesting or important or unusual we need to know about your family?<o:p></o:p></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What was your relationship like with your Mother? Father? Others?<o:p></o:p></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">How is your relationship now?<o:p></o:p></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Early Childhood through middle school<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What experiences, growing up, marked your memory? In other words, what can you remember about your childhood, what stands out?<o:p></o:p></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Who were your best friends?<o:p></o:p></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Worst enemies, bullies?<o:p></o:p></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">What was your best day? Worst?<o:p></o:p></span></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><br /></div><div style="margin-bottom: .0001pt; margin: 0in;"><b><span style="font-family: &quot;georgia&quot; , serif;">Here are some photos that remind me of you:<o:p></o:p></span></b></div><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt;"><br /></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt;"></div><br /><div style="margin: 0in 0in 0.0001pt;"><div style="margin: 0px;"><br /></div></div><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><h4 style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 15.4px; line-height: 19.6px; margin: 0px; position: relative;"><div style="font-weight: normal;"><b>Comment on this post, or Hit me up on Twitter&nbsp;<a href="https://twitter.com/darrellwolfe" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">@DarrellWolfe&nbsp;</a>,&nbsp;Google&nbsp;<a class="g-profile" data-gapiattached="true" data-gapiscan="true" data-onload="true" href="https://plus.google.com/106337514196493406365" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">+DarrellWolfe</a>, Facebook&nbsp;<a href="https://www.facebook.com/groups/907869989282584/" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">DarrellGWolfe</a>,&nbsp;</b></div></h4><blockquote class="tr_bq" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 15.4px; line-height: 19.6px;"><br /></blockquote><h4 style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 15.4px; line-height: 19.6px; margin: 0px; position: relative;">By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></h4><blockquote class="tr_bq" style="background-color: white; color: #333333; font-family: Verdana, Geneva, sans-serif; font-size: 15.4px; line-height: 19.6px;"><i>Storyteller, Creative,&nbsp;<a href="http://www.16personalities.com/infj-personality" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">INFJ</a>,&nbsp;<a href="https://www.gallupstrengthscenter.com/Purchase/en-US/Product?Path=Clifton%20StrengthsFinder" style="color: #149adf; text-decoration: none;" target="_blank">Intellection</a>, Ideation, Input, Learner, Achiever</i></blockquote><br /><i>* I may include "Affiliate Links" which means I earn a commission when you buy some of the products I link to.&nbsp;</i><br /><br /><ul><li><i>See my full about page and disclosures:&nbsp;<a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/p/what-is-this.html" target="_blank">Click Here</a>.&nbsp;</i></li></ul><ul><li><i>Also check out my&nbsp;<a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/p/affiliate-store.html" target="_blank">Resources and Suggestions&nbsp;</a>for writers (<a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/p/affiliate-store.html" target="_blank">here</a>).&nbsp;</i></li></ul><br /><i></i><br /><br /><a href="http://authorfun.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">It's Author Fun</a>&nbsp;By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a><br /><br />To Subscribe to the&nbsp;<a href="http://feeds.feedburner.com/AuthorFun" target="_blank">RSS: Click Here</a><br /><br />For Non-Fiction stories with a lesson by&nbsp;<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe: Click Here</a><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><div style="clear: both; float: left; padding-bottom: 10px; text-align: right;"></div>
